topic: Perimeter expressions with combining like terms
latex:
A triangle has side lengths of $(9u + 2)$ centimeters, $(5u + 5)$ centimeters, and $(5v - 2)$ centimeters. Which expression represents the perimeter, in centimeters, of the triangle?

A. $7v + 14u + 3v$

B. $21u + 3v$

C. $14u + 5v + 5$

D. $11u + 3v + 10$
